CREATE TABLE test_array (id Int32, values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT arrayCount(x -> x > 0, values) FROM test_array;
SELECT arrayCount(x -> x < 0, values) FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arrayCount(values) FROM test_array WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, arrayCount() FROM test_array WHERE values IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, arrayCount(x -> x == 2, values) FROM test_array GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_array2 AS (SELECT arrayJoin(values) AS value FROM test_array);
SELECT arrayCount(x -> x % 2 = 0, arrayJoin(values)) FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arrayCount(x -> x IS NOT NULL, values) FROM test_array WHERE size(values) > 0;
SELECT id, arrayCount(x -> x > 5, values) FROM test_array HAVING count_positive > 0;
